content: You are a helpful customer support assistant. Be professional and accurate.
How do I update my shipping address?

You can update your shipping address by going to Account Settings > Addresses > Edit. Click on the address you'd like to change and enter your new details. The changes will apply to all future orders.
Great, and can I have multiple shipping addresses on file?

Yes, you can save up to five shipping addresses on your account. Go to Account Settings > Addresses > Add New Address. When placing an order, you'll be able to choose from any of your saved addresses at checkout.
